sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85820" key="po/rrw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πόρρω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πόρπ-ωθεν</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πορπ-ωτέρω</orth>, <sense id="n85820.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πρόσω, πρόσωθεν</ref></xr>, etc. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πορσαίνω</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πορσύνω.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
